{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-49252", "cvss": {"score": 9.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-1321", "name": "Improperly Controlled Modification of Object Prototype Attributes ('Prototype Pollution')"}], "description": "### Impact
Prototype pollution in deepstream server v <=10.0.4. Potential privilege escalation from any authenticated user with write permission to any record.

### Patches
Yes, upgrade to v10.0.5

### Workarounds
Filter out all messages containing the path `__proto__`, `constructor`, `prototype`, **before they reach the server's message pipeline**", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0027, "percentile": 0.18543}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-9v98-6g37-x9g6", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-26T21:03:59Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9v98-6g37-x9g6", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-9v98-6g37-x9g6"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-49252"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-18T21:16:29Z", "published_at": "2026-06-26T21:03:59Z", "references": ["https://github.com/deepstreamIO/deepstream.io/security/advisories/GHSA-9v98-6g37-x9g6", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-49252", "https://github.com/deepstreamIO/deepstream.io/commit/54b8e2958a98df444b5b5d9a66e22872afd84e44", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9v98-6g37-x9g6"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/deepstreamIO/deepstream.io/security-advisories/GHSA-9v98-6g37-x9g6", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/deepstreamIO/deepstream.io", "summary": "deepstream is vulnerable to prototype pollution", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-26T21:04:00Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-9v98-6g37-x9g6", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "10.0.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@deepstream/server"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 10.0.5"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: deepstream is vulnerable to prototype pollution
